question_en: Which number will replace 'X' in the following numerical series? 0, 7, 26, X, 124, 215

subject: reasoning
fingerprint: which number will replace x in the following numerical series 0 7 26 x 124 215

question_en: Find the word that can be formed using the letters of the given word. SUPERVISION
question_hi: नीचे दिए गए शब्द के वर्णों का प्रयोग करके बनाए जा सकने वाले शब्द को ज्ञात कीजिए । SUPERVISION
subject: reasoning
explanation: The word NERVOUS can be formed using the letters from SUPERVISION.
fingerprint: find the word that can be formed using the letters of the given word supervision

question_en: On the occasion of Ajay's birthday, an equal amount of chocolates were to be distributed among 100 children. He could distribute chocolates to only 70 children so that each child got 3 extra chocolates. What was the total number of chocolates available for distribution?
question_hi: अजय के जन्मदिन के अवसर पर 100 बच्चों में बराबर मात्रा में चॉकलेट वितरित किए जाने थे । वह केवल 70 बच्चों में चॉकलेट वितरित कर सका ताकि प्रत्येक बच्चे को 3 चॉकलेट अतिरिक्त मिल सकें । वितरण के लिए कुल कितने चॉकलेट उपलब्ध थे ?
subject: maths
explanation: Let total chocolates be C. Originally C/100 per child. Now C/70 per child. C/70 - C/100 = 3 => 30C/7000 = 3 => C = 700.
fingerprint: on the occasion of ajays birthday an equal amount of chocolates were to be distributed among 100 children he could distribute chocolates to only 70 children so that each child got 3 extra chocolates what was the total number of chocolates available for distribution

question_en: If in a certain code language 'over and above' is written as 'da pa ta' and 'old and beautiful' is written as 'sa na pa', then how will 'and' be written in that code language?
question_hi: यदि किसी कूट भाषा में ‘over and above’ को ‘da pa ta’ और ‘old and beautiful’ को ‘sa na pa’ लिखा जाता है, तो उसी कूट भाषा में ‘and’ को किस प्रकार लिखा जाएगा ?
subject: reasoning
explanation: The common word in both phrases is 'and', and the common code is 'pa'. Thus, 'and' is coded as 'pa'.
fingerprint: if in a certain code language over and above is written as da pa ta and old and beautiful is written as sa na pa then how will and be written in that code language

question_en: Find the odd term which is coded differently.
question_hi: भिन्न पद का पता लंगाइए जो अलग तरीके से कूटित किया गया
subject: reasoning
explanation: In HOPE -> EHPO, the 1st and 4th letters are swapped, and 2nd and 3rd are swapped. In MORE -> ERMO, it does not follow this exact swap pattern.
fingerprint: find the odd term which is coded differently

question_en: If x is a 3-digit number and y is the number formed by changing the digits of x in any order, then the number (x - y) will always be divisible by:
question_hi: यदि x एक 3-अंकीय संख्या है और y, x के अंकों को किसी भी क्रम में बदल कर बनने वाली संख्या हो, तो संख्या (x – y) सदैव विभाजित होगी :
subject: maths
explanation: The difference between any number and the number formed by rearranging its digits is always a multiple of 9.
fingerprint: if x is a 3digit number and y is the number formed by changing the digits of x in any order then the number x y will always be divisible by

question_en: The sum of two numbers is 45 and their difference is 1/9th of the sum. The LCM of the numbers is:
question_hi: दो संख्याओं का योगफल 45 है तथा उनका अन्तर योगफल का 9वाँ भाग है । संख्याओं का LCM है :
subject: maths
explanation: Sum = 45. Difference = 45 / 9 = 5. So the numbers are (45+5)/2 = 25 and (45-5)/2 = 20. LCM of 20 and 25 is 100.
fingerprint: the sum of two numbers is 45 and their difference is 19th of the sum the lcm of the numbers is

question_en: Three different traffic lights, installed at three different signal points, change after 45 seconds, 75 seconds, and 90 seconds respectively. If all three change together at 7:20:15 hours, then at what time will they change together next time?
question_hi: तीन विभिन्न ट्रैफिक लाइट्स, जो तीन विभिन्न सिग्नल बिंदुओं पर लगी हैं, क्रमश: 45 सेकंड, 75 सेकंड तथा 90 सेकंड़ के बाद बदल रही हैं । यदि यह तीनों एक साथ 7 : 20 : 15 घंटे पर बदलती हैं, तो अगली बार यह कितने बजे एक साथ बदलेंगी ?
subject: maths
explanation: LCM of 45, 75, and 90 is 450 seconds. 450 seconds = 7 minutes and 30 seconds. 7:20:15 + 0:07:30 = 7:27:45.
fingerprint: three different traffic lights installed at three different signal points change after 45 seconds 75 seconds and 90 seconds respectively if all three change together at 72015 hours then at what time will they change together next time

question_en: If A's income is 10% more than B's income and B's income is 20% less than C's income, then the ratio of the incomes of A, B and C respectively is:
question_hi: यदि A की आय, B की आय से 10% अधिक है तथा B की आय, C की आय से 20% कम है, तो क्रमशः A, B तथा की आय में अनुपात है :
subject: maths
explanation: Let C's income be 100. Then B's income is 80. A's income is 10% more than 80, so 88. Ratio A:B:C = 88 : 80 : 100 = 22 : 20 : 25.
fingerprint: if as income is 10 more than bs income and bs income is 20 less than cs income then the ratio of the incomes of a b and c respectively is

question_en: Mr. X has some sum of money. He wants to distribute this sum among five laborers in the ratio 1/2 : 1/3 : 1/4 : 1/5 : 1/7. What is the minimum amount he should have so that each laborer gets the amount in whole rupees?
question_hi: श्री X के पास कुछ धनराशि है । वह इस धनराशि को पाँच मज़दूरों में ½ : ⅓ : ¼ : ⅕ : 1/7 के अनुपात में बाँटना चाहता है । उसके पास कम-से-कम कितनी धनराशि होनी चाहिए, जिससे प्रत्येक मजदूर को पूर्ण संख्या में रुपए प्राप्त हों ?
subject: maths
explanation: LCM of denominators (2, 3, 4, 5, 7) is 420. Multiply each fraction by 420 to get integers: 210, 140, 105, 84, 60. Minimum total amount = 210 + 140 + 105 + 84 + 60 = 599.
fingerprint: mr x has some sum of money he wants to distribute this sum among five laborers in the ratio 12 13 14 15 17 what is the minimum amount he should have so that each laborer gets the amount in whole rupees

question_en: There are three positive numbers. One-third of the average of these three numbers is 8 less than the largest number. The average of the smallest number and the second smallest number is 8. What is the largest number?
question_hi: तीन धनात्मक संख्याएँ हैं । इन तीनों संख्याओं के औसत का एक-तिहाई, सबसे बड़ी संख्या से 8 कम है । सबसे छोटी संख्या और दूसरी सबसे छोटी संख्या का औसत 8 है । सबसे बड़ी संख्या क्या है ?
subject: maths
explanation: Let numbers be x, y, z (x <= y <= z). Average of x and y is 8, so x+y=16. Average of three is (16+z)/3. One third of this is (16+z)/9. So (16+z)/9 = z - 8. 16+z = 9z - 72. 8z = 88 => z = 11.
fingerprint: there are three positive numbers onethird of the average of these three numbers is 8 less than the largest number the average of the smallest number and the second smallest number is 8 what is the largest number

question_en: By selling a plot for ₹ 18,700, its owner incurs a loss of 15%. At what price should he sell the plot for a 15% profit?
question_hi: एक प्लॉट को ₹ 18,700 में बेचने पर, इसके मालिक को 15% की हानि होती है । 15% लाभ के लिए वह प्लॉट को कितने में बेचे ?
subject: maths
fingerprint: by selling a plot for 18700 its owner incurs a loss of 15 at what price should he sell the plot for a 15 profit

question_en: If an article is sold at a 20% profit, then which of the following is the ratio of its cost price and selling price?
question_hi: यदि एक वस्तु 20% लाभ पर बेची गई, तो निम्न में से कौन-सा एक इसके क्रय मूल्य और विक्रय मूल्य में अनुपात है ?
subject: maths
explanation: Let cost price be 100. Since profit is 20%, selling price is 120. Ratio of CP to SP = 100:120 = 5:6.
fingerprint: if an article is sold at a 20 profit then which of the following is the ratio of its cost price and selling price

question_en: A started a business by investing ₹ 38,000. After 5 months, B also joined this business by investing a capital of ₹ 55,000. At the end of the year, there was a total profit of ₹ 22,000. Which of the following amounts is approximately equal to the difference between the profits of A and B?
question_hi: A ने ₹ 38,000 लगा कर व्यापार आरम्भ किया । 5 माह के बाद ₹ 55,000 की पूँजी लगा कर B ने भी इस व्यापार में प्रवेश किया । वर्ष के अंत में ₹ 22,000 का कुल लाभ हुआ । निम्न में से कौन-सी राशि A और B के लाभ के लगभग अन्तर के समान है ?
subject: maths
fingerprint: a started a business by investing 38000 after 5 months b also joined this business by investing a capital of 55000 at the end of the year there was a total profit of 22000 which of the following amounts is approximately equal to the difference between the profits of a and b

question_en: Two types of tea costing ₹ 126 per kg and ₹ 135 per kg are mixed with a third type in the ratio 1 : 1 : 2. If the mixture is worth ₹ 153 per kg, then the price of the third type of tea per kg is:
question_hi: ₹ 126 प्रति किलोग्राम तथा ₹ 135 प्रति किलोग्राम की चाय की प्रकार को एक तीसरी प्रकार की चाय में 1: 1 : 2 के अनुपात में मिलाया गया । यदि मिश्रण का मूल्य ₹ 153 प्रति किलोग्राम है, तो तीसरी प्रकार की चाय का प्रति किलोग्राम मूल्य
subject: maths
explanation: Let third type cost x. Total cost of 1+1+2 = 4 parts is 4 * 153 = 612. So, 126 + 135 + 2x = 612 => 261 + 2x = 612 => 2x = 351 => x = 175.5.
fingerprint: two types of tea costing 126 per kg and 135 per kg are mixed with a third type in the ratio 1  1  2 if the mixture is worth 153 per kg then the price of the third type of tea per kg is

question_en: A man and a boy together can do a digging work in 40 days, while the ratio of their digging speed is 8 : 5. If the boy alone is put to dig, in how many days will he be able to complete this work?
question_hi: एक आदमी और एक लड़का मिल कर खुदाई का एक कार्य 40 दिन में कर सकते हैं जबकि उनकी खुदाई करने की गति का अनुपात 8 : 5 है । यदि लड़के को अकेले खुदाई के लिए लगाया जाए, तो वह इस कार्य को कितने दिनों में पूरा कर पाएगा ?
subject: maths
explanation: Total efficiency = 8 + 5 = 13 units/day. Total work = 13 * 40 = 520 units. Time taken by boy alone = 520 / 5 = 104 days.
fingerprint: a man and a boy together can do a digging work in 40 days while the ratio of their digging speed is 8  5 if the boy alone is put to dig in how many days will he be able to complete this work

question_en: A sum of money doubles itself in 7 years at simple interest. In how many years will it become four times?
question_hi: एक धनराशि साधारण ब्याज पर 7 वर्षों में दुगुनी हो जाती है। वह कितने वर्षों में चार गुनी हो जाएगी।
subject: maths
explanation: For money to double, interest = Principal, which takes 7 years. To become four times, interest must be 3 times Principal. Thus, 3 * 7 = 21 years.
fingerprint: a sum of money doubles itself in 7 years at simple interest in how many years will it become four times
